examples: Our humanness arises out of these relationships in the course of social interaction.
Moreover, our humanness must be sustained through social interactionвАФand fairly constantly so.
Is there a perfect form of humanness behind all humans?
We can never underestimate how important it is to our basic humanness to be self-sufficient in every way.
The robots were the Roomba, a disc-shaped autonomous vacuum cleaner, and four anthropoid machines of varying degrees of humanness.
